prompt: Maintain the twin individuals from the reference image, realistic live-action style, Japanese TV news street interview footage. The theme is "Does the doppelgänger exist?". A news program interview microphone is slightly visible at the edge of the screen. The twins are standing side-by-side in casual private clothes, answering the interview with serious expressions. At the bottom of the screen is an actual Japanese news-style ticker. A color scheme and design typical of news programs, based on blue, white, and orange. At the top is a headline styled like "Does the doppelgänger exist?: Voices from the Street". In the large subtitle ticker at the bottom, a comment saying "It would be scary if there was someone just like me" is displayed. News-style ticker placement, outlined text, semi-transparent information bars, and other UI designs like a real TV program. The twins are not looking at the camera, but talking naturally while looking towards the interviewer slightly to the side. The background has a busy street with people, a light bokeh effect. Realistic video feel characteristic of TV reporting cameras, natural light, shallow depth of field, documentary style. No corporate logos or company names at all in clothes, signs, or on screen. Photorealistic, ultra-high definition, realistic TV news program quality.
